title: Vanilla Ice Cream (With Chocolate Chips)
description: This modpack overhauls Vanilla features, and adds vanilla friendly features
body:
Discover a whole new dimension to your Minecraft journey with the Vanilla Plus Modpack! This meticulously curated collection of mods is designed to enhance your vanilla gameplay experience, offering exciting new features and challenges while staying true to the core essence of the game.


Mod credits:
Structory: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory

StructoryTowers: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory-towers

vanilla tweak: https://vanillatweaks.net/
